$operator.summary: Target-repository verification commands grouped by workflow purpose.
$operator.note: Populate only commands verified from the target repository's own documentation, manifests, or executable scripts. Use explicit environment entrypoints and add probes that identify runtime/tool versions when interpreter selection can affect results. Empty profiles are reported as not configured and are never replaced with guessed npm, Python, or other technology-specific commands.

static.description: Formatting, lint, type, syntax, or compile-only checks.

fast.description: Focused unit and regression checks suitable for implementation feedback.

full.description: The complete documented automated verification suite.
